zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaretha van Limburg於1138年7月16日出生在比利時利包格時，她的父親Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen25歲，母親Mathilde von Saffenberg33歲。她於1155年之前與Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen在比利時布拉班特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1172年9月10日在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年34歲，埋葬在比利時布拉班特洛文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaretha van Limburg于1138年7月16日出生在比利时利包格时，她的父亲Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen25岁，母亲Mathilde von Saffenberg33岁。她于1155年之前与Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen在比利时布拉班特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1172年9月10日在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年34岁，埋葬在比利时布拉班特洛文。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Limburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, the largest being in Hesse.

Dutch (also Van Limburg): habitational name for someone from the province of Limburg or from several places so named, like Limburg in the Belgian province of Liège or from Limbourg in Haut-Rhin, France, all named with the ancient Germanic elements lindo ‘lime tree’ or ‘dragon’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaretha van Limburg was born on 16 July 1138, in Limburg, Belgium, her father, Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen, was 25 and her mother, Mathilde von Saffenberg, was 33. She married Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen before 1155, in Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 10 September 1172, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 34, and was buried in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaretha van Limburg est née le 16 juillet 1138, à Limbourg, Belgique, son père, Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Saffenberg, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen avant 1155, à Brabant, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1172, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Leuven, Brabant, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaretha van Limburg am 16. Juli 1138 in Limburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen 25 und ihre Mutter Mathilde von Saffenberg 33. Sie hat vor 1155 in Brabant, Belgien Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 10. September 1172 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien und wurde in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha van Limburg è nata il il 16 luglio 1138 nel Limburgo, Belgio, sua padre, Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mathilde von Saffenberg, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen prima del 1155, nel Brabante, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 10 settembre 1172, nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Leuven, Brabante, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretha van Limburgが1138年7月16日にベルギーリンブルグで生まれた時，父Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlenは25歳，母Mathilde von Saffenbergは33歳であった。1155年以前にベルギーブラバントでGodfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1172年9月10日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで34歳で死去し，ベルギーブラバントレウベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaretha van Limburg(이)가 1138년 7월 16일 벨기에 림버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde von Saffenberg(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1155년 이전 벨기에 브라반트에서 Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1172년 9월 10일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에 묻혔다.

mn.16 July 1138–10 September 1172: 1138 оны Долоодугаар сарын 16–1172 оны Есдүгээр сарын 10

pt.16 July 1138–10 September 1172: 16 de julho de 1138–10 de setembro de 1172
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha van Limburg nasceu em 16 de julho de 1138, em Limburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Saffenberg, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen antes 1155, em Brabante, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1172, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaretha van Limburg родилась 16 июля 1138 г. в местности лимбург, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Saffenberg, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen перед 1155 г. в местности брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 10 сентября 1172 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия.

es.16 July 1138–10 September 1172: 16 de julio de 1138–10 de septiembre de 1172
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaretha van Limburg nació el 16 de julio de 1138, en Limburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Saffenberg, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen antes de 1155, en Brabante, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1172, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica.
